description_long: This is a plush brown teddy bear with a textured, fuzzy surface and rounded ears. Its face features a small, rounded snout with a stitched nose and subtle, dark eyes that give it a gentle, friendly expression. The bear is adorned with a dark ribbon tied around its neck, which has white printed text on it. Its limbs are short and rounded, with the arms resting at its sides and the legs splayed forward. The overall appearance is soft and inviting, with some visible wear and slight irregularities in the fur texture. The bear's back is plain, with no additional accessories or markings.
description: A soft, brown teddy bear with a textured surface, dark eyes, and a ribbon with printed text around its neck.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bear's face, ribbon with text, and both arms and legs clearly visible.
description_view_1: Rear three-quarter view highlighting the back of the head, body, and the side of the ribbon.
description_view_2: Direct back view showing the plain, textured back and the rounded shape of the head and body.
description_view_3: Side view displaying the bear's profile, including the snout, one ear, and the side of the ribbon.
attribute_facial_expression: The bear has a gentle, neutral expression with small, dark eyes and a slight, stitched smile. Its features convey a calm and friendly demeanor.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with its legs splayed forward and arms resting at its sides.
